req: 8+ years of experience in cloud architecture and enterprise solutions. Expert knowledge of AWS, Azure, and GCP platforms. Strong experience with multi-cloud strategies and hybrid cloud environments. Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation). Experience with cloud security and compliance frameworks. Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
notes: Executive-level compensation package. Performance-based bonuses up to 25%. Comprehensive healthcare and wellness programs. Remote-first work culture. Professional certification reimbursement. Stock options and equity grants.
duties: Design and implement enterprise-wide cloud architecture strategies. Lead cloud migration projects and oversee technical implementations. Define cloud governance policies and security frameworks. Mentor engineering teams on cloud best practices. Collaborate with C-suite executives on digital transformation initiatives. Evaluate and recommend emerging cloud technologies.
selection: Multi-stage assessment including architecture design presentation, technical deep-dive interview, executive leadership discussion, whiteboard system design challenge, and strategic thinking evaluation. Previous enterprise-scale project portfolio review required.
